EmailTemplate.description: Chaser email to claim for PI, PL, etc...
EmailTemplate.name: 2nd FNOL Chaser to Insured – PI, PL etc...
EmailTemplate.subject: Information still required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I hope you are well.
Further to my email of the (insert date) and email sent on (insert date).
Please could you let me know if you still wish to make a claim and please do not hesitate to ask if you require any assistance in collecting the information so that we may present a claim.
(For PI do not reference to still wishing to make a claim as all PI claims need referring to insurers.) If you no longer wish to make a claim, please could you also reply by return to let me know.
I would like to draw your attention to the condition in your policy below:
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
